name: Platelet-derived extracellular vesicles
summary: Platelet-derived extracellular vesicles are normalized for a healthy-volunteer wound-healing phase I trial.
mechanism_summary: Uses platelet-derived vesicle material to test local wound-repair signaling and safety in humans.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Platelet EVs were safe but did not improve healthy-volunteer wound closure; Plexoval II platelet extracellular vesicle wound-healing phase I trial.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
